adjusted.reasoning: Bronze final: market FRA -112 / X +278 / ENG +285 de-vigs to ~50/25/25, dead on the Elo baseline (48/25/27) for once. The differentiator is TOTALS: Over 2.5 at -225 (~65-69% over) - third-place games are open, both sides rotate defenders (Saliba OUT/back surgery; England may rest Rice/Saka) while Mbappe STARTS chasing the boot (needs to out-produce Messi 8g+4a). Fitted lambdas from outcome probs alone give total 2.7 and EP-max 1:0; re-fitting with the market total (~3.1) flips EP-max to 2:1 (1.83 vs 1.79) with 2-1 the modal France win (9.6%). Predicted 2-1 France; high-total override documented per NOR-ENG precedent (0:1 vs actual 1-2).

factors.factor: Over 2.5 goals -225 / Under +165 -> market expects ~3.1 total; bronze finals historically open
Mbappe starts (boot chase, trails Messi 8g+4a on assists); Saliba out (back); England rotation risk Kane/Bellingham/Rice

posted_to.note: Bronze final bet. EP-max flips 1:0 -> 2:1 when lambdas re-fit to the market total (~3.1, Over2.5 -225): 2:1 EP 1.83 vs 1:0 EP 1.79, and 2-1 is the modal France win (9.6%). NOR-ENG precedent (high-total market beat the default fit). PROTECT: +9 Stef / +6 human; 2:1 also likely matches Stef's signature = natural freeze vs him.
